title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 1 May 2024.

items.title: **Xbox Games Showcase** and “Redacted” Direct announced for June 9
bullets: June 9, 2024, starting at 10am PT / 1pm ET / 6pm BST
The "Redacted Direct" will start immediately after the Xbox Games Showcase

bullets.text: Editors Note: SPOILERS: It's clear "Redacted" is the next Call of Duty: Black Ops title.

items.title: **Starfield**’s Shattered Space story expansion is launching this fall
bullets: Ahead of that, the game's next update will include ship building and city map features
No exact release date atm

items.title: **Fallout 4**’s free next-gen update now available for PlayStation Plus Collection owners
bullets: After much confusion and many mixed messages, both PS+ and PS Collection users should now have access to the PS5 update of Fallout 4

items.title: New **Xbox Game Pass** titles for console, PC and Cloud have been announced
bullets: Arriving:
Have A Nice Death (Cloud, Console, and PC) – April 30
Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition (Cloud, Console, and PC) – May 2
Kona II: Brume (Cloud, Console, and PC) – May 7
Little Kitty, Big City (Cloud, Console, and PC) – May 9
Brothers: A Tale of Two Sons (Cloud, Console, and PC) – May 14
Leaving:
May 15th

bullets.text: Fuga: Melodies of Steel 2 (Cloud, Console, PC)
SD Gundam Battle Alliance (Cloud, Console, PC)
Supraland Six Inches Under (Cloud, Console, PC)

items.title: **Deliver Us Mars** developer Keoken Interactive lays off team after failing to find funding at GDC
bullets: 13 people affected, only the two co-founders remain

The pair wrote that the team had been let go due to "nothing substantial materialising directly after our visit to GDC," adding: "We’ve unfortunately exhausted all our possible options for publishing, work for hire, and co-development."

items.title: **Hasbro**'s $1 billion bet on internal game development
bullets: Instead of licensing out properties, Hasbro is attempting to build internal teams.
The company has four AAA studios right now:
North Carolina-based Atomic Arcade, which is working on a Snake Eyes GI Joe game
Montreal-based Invoke Studios is working on a Dungeons & Dragons game
Austin, Texas-based Skeleton Key is "doing something spooky
Another Austin, Texas studio, called Archetype, where BioWare veteran and Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic lead designer James Ohlen is working on a new franchise called Exodus

items.title: **Square Enix** abandons £112m of in-development projects in an effort to improve quality
bullets: Will be "more selective" moving forward
